status: INITIAL STRATEGIC OVERVIEW - The living, detailed asset documentation now lives in docs/assets/. This document provides the original strategic context (why, what, when). For HOW (prompt assembly, production pipeline, QA gates, slicing, categories, checklist), refer to the docs/assets/ structure described in the 'docs_assets_mapping' section below.
art_direction:
Fantasy idle RPG with modern, slightly stylized 3D-rendered 2D look. Rich colors, clear silhouettes, readable at small sizes. Consistent style across all assets.

Full art direction: docs/assets/00_FOUNDATION/00_ART_DIRECTION.md
Style bible (camera, lighting, materials): docs/assets/00_FOUNDATION/01_STYLE_BIBLE.md

vector_fallback.description: SVG icons for UI, simple unit representations, map markers
vector_fallback.use_case: UI elements, fallback when 3D assets not loaded, low-end devices

png_3d_rendered.note: This original concept has evolved into the RARITY ATLAS system (2048x1365, 2x3 sprite grid, chroma green). See docs/assets/01_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM/00_SPRITE_ATLAS_CONTRACT.md

specs.format: WebP with alpha channel (PNG only during generation)
specs.style: Consistent fantasy 3D render, soft lighting, chroma green background (#00FF00) for atlas
specs.prompt_template: See docs/assets/01_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM/02_PROMPT_MODULE_SYSTEM.md for the modular prompt assembly framework, or docs/assets/02_POC/ for validated production prompts

png_3d_rendered.use_case: Hero rarity atlases (252 sprites: 1 faction x 7 classes x 6 rarities x 2 genders), generic units, item icons, boss creatures

environment.description: Background images for battle fields, map nodes, UI screens

specs.style: Fantasy landscape, atmospheric, painterly but not photorealistic

effects.description: Battle effects, UI animations, particle sprites

00_FOUNDATION.description: Visual constitution: art direction, style bible, heraldry, equipment silhouette locks. Changes rarely.
files: 00_ART_DIRECTION.md - Core art direction, proportions, faction/class design
01_STYLE_BIBLE.md - Camera, lighting, materials, shapes, colors, faction themes

01_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM.description: Active prompt generator: how to build a new rarity atlas prompt from reusable modules
files: 01_REFERENCE_FRAME_SYSTEM.md - Invisible consistency frame, identical slot positioning
02_PROMPT_MODULE_SYSTEM.md - Module order, Body Scale Lock, Effect Boundary, Gender/Body Lock
03_HERO_RARITY_ATLAS_FACTORY.md - Skeleton + input table for new class prompts

02_POC.description: Concrete, validated production prompts - ready to paste into AI tools
files: _TEMPLATE.md - Blank template for new class/faction combos
HUMAN_MAGE_V1.md - In test - validates framework for different body type/gender

03_PIPELINE.description: What to do AFTER generating the image: QA, slicing, export, workflow
files: 01_ATLAS_TO_ASSET_PIPELINE.md - PNG atlas -> WebP -> manifest, step by step
03_WORKFLOW_AND_TOOLS.md - Task split (you/AI), tools, file weight table

04_CATEGORIES.description: Everything that is NOT a hero rarity atlas: backgrounds, portraits, items, bosses, UI, emotions, generics, placeholders
files: 07_GENERIC_UNITS.md - Enemies/soldiers - 3 face variants, no Image Guidance
08_PLACEHOLDER_STRATEGY.md - How to handle missing assets in dev/test
00_ASSET_LIST_REFERENCE.md - Complete asset list with categories, quantities, phases
02_COMBAT_VISUAL_STATES.md - Why blood/burn/frozen are overlays, not sprites

asset_pipeline_original_plan.note: The original 5-step pipeline below is the conceptual outline. The actual detailed pipeline (with QA gates, atlas slicing, chroma key removal, WebP export, asset manifest updates) lives in docs/assets/03_PIPELINE/.
asset_pipeline_original_plan.generation: AI tools generate base assets from detailed prompts. See docs/assets/01_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM/ for prompt assembly, docs/assets/02_POC/ for validated prompts.
asset_pipeline_original_plan.cleanup: Manual or semi-automated background removal, color correction. Chroma green (#00FF00) removal in docs/assets/03_PIPELINE/02_SPRITE_SLICING_SPEC.md.
asset_pipeline_original_plan.optimization: Convert to WebP, generate multiple resolutions, lazy loading. See docs/assets/03_PIPELINE/01_ATLAS_TO_ASSET_PIPELINE.md.
asset_pipeline_original_plan.versioning: Assets in Git LFS, versioned with game releases.
asset_pipeline_original_plan.cdn: Upload to Supabase Storage / Cloudflare R2, served via CDN.

consistency_strategy.style_guide: docs/assets/00_FOUNDATION/00_ART_DIRECTION.md (proportions, faction/class design) and docs/assets/00_FOUNDATION/01_STYLE_BIBLE.md (camera, lighting, materials, shapes, colors)
consistency_strategy.reference_frame: docs/assets/01_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM/01_REFERENCE_FRAME_SYSTEM.md - Invisible consistency frame for atlas slots
consistency_strategy.batch_generation: Generate assets in batches with same seed/style parameters. See docs/assets/02_POC/ for validated batch prompts.

placeholder_strategy.note: Full placeholder strategy with implementation details: docs/assets/04_CATEGORIES/08_PLACEHOLDER_STRATEGY.md
placeholder_strategy.mvp: Colored rectangles with unit class icons (Font Awesome / custom SVG)
